name: EZ-Crosshair
short_description: Enhance your gaming precision with EZ-Crosshair, a user-friendly app providing customizable crosshair overlays for a personalized and immersive gaming experience.
detailed_description:
EZ-Crosshair is a user-friendly application designed to enhance your gaming experience. It provides a customizable crosshair overlay, allowing players to tailor their crosshair to suit their preferences. With a simple and intuitive interface, EZ-Crosshair ensures a seamless and personalized gaming environment. Elevate your accuracy and gameplay with this essential tool.

  • Create, save, and share custom crosshairs.
  • Works in full screen mode.
  • Supports console controllers.
  • Download crosshairs from the community.
  • Share crosshairs with the community.
  • Use crosshairs from your friends.
  • Import images.
  • Create multiple layers.
  • Change shape, color, size, effects, position, and more.
  • Add animations to crosshairs.
  • Animate the crosshair whenever you want (when aiming, shooting, or any other action).
  • Assign a shortcut to enable/disable each crosshair.
  • Easy and intuitive UI.

English*, Spanish - Spain*, Spanish - Latin America*, French*, German*, Dutch*, Portuguese - Brazil*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*, Ukrainian*
